verses.translationText: By the heaven containing pathways,
Indeed, you are in differing speech.
Deluded away from the Qur'an is he who is deluded.
Destroyed are the falsifiers
Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense?"
[It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire

verses.arabicText: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.translationText: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."
Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,

verses.arabicText: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
verses.translationText: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.

verses.arabicText: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
verses.translationText: They used to sleep but little of the night,
And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.

verses.arabicText: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّۭ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.translationText: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.

verses.arabicText: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.translationText: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham? -

verses.arabicText: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا ۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٌۭ قَوْمٌۭ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.translationText: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace, [you are] a people unknown.

verses.arabicText: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍۢ سَمِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"

verses.arabicText: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
verses.translationText: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.

verses.arabicText: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍۢ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman!"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.translationText: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."
